Staff Software Engineer — Platform Infrastructure

We're looking for a staff-level engineer to lead our platform infrastructure
team. You'll own the runtime, deployment, and observability layers that the
rest of engineering builds on.

Responsibilities:
- Drive technical direction for our Kubernetes platform across 200+ services
- Lead initiatives to reduce deploy latency and improve developer experience
- Partner with product engineering teams on capacity planning and database design
- Mentor engineers across multiple teams; influence senior IC career growth

Requirements:
- 6+ years of backend experience with at least 2 years on infra or platform work
- Deep expertise in Kubernetes, Postgres, and distributed systems
- Strong systems-level performance debugging skills
- Experience leading large rewrites or migrations
- Excellent written and verbal communication

Bonus:
- Open-source contributions
- Experience with Go
- Background in observability tooling

We're a 200-person Series C startup based in NYC; remote-friendly.
